---
title: "Urban Green QGIS Plugin"
description: "PyQGIS plugin for analysing and planning neighbourhood green spaces on former industrial sites."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [Python, QGIS, PyQGIS, Urban Green]
---

## About

A QGIS plugin developed for the analysis and planning of urban green spaces ("Quartiersgrün") on the former HuKla industrial site in Gengenbach. The plugin automates spatial workflows — tree inventory, green coverage analysis, and planning support — directly inside QGIS via a simple GUI.

## Stack

[Python]{.badge-skill} [PyQGIS]{.badge-skill} [QGIS]{.badge-skill} [Urban Green]{.badge-skill}
